name: 2 Channel Zigbee Retrofit Relay

description.consumer:
Two switches. One module. Zero effort.

Control two circuits from a single module hidden behind your existing switches. Lights in two rooms, a fan and a light — whatever the combination, each channel responds independently. Your walls stay the same. Your home gets smarter.
description.technical:
A dual-channel Zigbee switching relay that converts two standard mechanical switches into smart switches simultaneously — without replacing any existing hardware.

Each channel operates independently with direct load switching up to 4A. For loads above 4A per channel, an external relay, SSR, or contactor is required. Installs behind existing switches in a flush box or on DIN rail. Communicates natively over Zigbee 3.0 with Home Assistant, and integrates with Matter and Apple HomeKit via a compatible hub.

Key Specifications
- Channels: 2 (independent)
- Max Switching: 5A per channel
- Direct Load: Up to 4A per channel
- Protocol: Zigbee 3.0
- Compatible with: Home Assistant (native), Matter & Apple HomeKit (via hub)
- Installation: Flush box or DIN rail

⚠ Direct load switching only — not a dry contact output and not a dimmer.

specs.summary: Voltage: 90–250V AC, 50/60Hz | Current: Total 10A | Wireless Protocol: Zigbee 3.0 | Operating Temperature: -10°C to +65°C | Case Temperature (Tc): +80°C Max | Operating Range: ≤70m | Dimensions: 40 × 40 × 18 mm | IP Rating: IP20 | Frequency Band: 2.405–2.480 GHz | Max Radio Transmit Power: <+10 dBm | Installation Type: Behind Switch / DIN Rail
specs.compatibility: Home Assistant (native), Matter & Apple HomeKit (via hub)

limitations: For loads above 4A per channel use external relay / SSR / contactor. Not a dimmer. Not dry contact.
